narrative: Speculation of a Strait of Hormuz reopening drives a -4.87% plunge in WTI crude, cooling geopolitical risk premiums as FOMC minutes reinforce a higher-for-longer stance. USD/JPY holds at 158.85 supported by a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry, though a -1.44 moderate put skew in 25d RR suggests options markets are hedging for downside; gold higher +0.78%; equities +1.08%; DXY -0.21%; VIX 17.4. GBP/AUD bilateral divergence (1.199% spread) remains the dominant G8 theme as GBP (+0.593% avg) outperforms AUD (-0.606% avg). Watch RBNZ Rate Decision at 02:00 UTC on May 27.
